underlying_goal: The user wanted to upgrade a legacy PHP 7.0 website to run on PHP 8.2, resolving all compatibility errors, updating dependencies, and fixing frontend vulnerabilities.
friction_detail: User stopped assistant from autonomously debugging .htaccess/Caddy routing and instructed to use subagents and wait for confirmation first.
brief_summary: The user successfully upgraded a legacy PHP 7.0 site to PHP 8.2 by fixing Illuminate, Symfony, Flight, and Eloquent compatibility issues, replacing aura/auth with custom secure code, and updating Bootstrap/jQuery CDN dependencies.
user_instructions_to_assistant: usa subagentes, por favor, esta tarea es muy compleja
antes de ponerte a trabajar, investiga, infórmame y espera a que te confirme que hacer
no cambies nada, solo haz una review, por favor
